title: Infosys Ranked Number One IT Services Provider for Banking in Europe and Financial Services in Nordics by Whitelane Research
detailed_summary: Infosys announced Whitelane Research recognitions in European and Nordic financial services IT sourcing studies. It was ranked number one for Financial Services - Banking in Europe and Financial Services in the Nordics, and named a top three Exceptional Performer in Financial Services - Overall and Cloud & Infrastructure Services in Europe.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was ranked as number one IT services provider for 'Financial Services - Banking' in the 'Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025/2026 Financial Services Europe'.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Ranked as Number One IT Services Provider for Banking in Europe and Financial Services in Nordics by Whitelane Research

key_facts.fact: Infosys was ranked as the number one IT services provider for Financial Services in the Nordics by 'Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2026'.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Ranked as Number One IT Services Provider for Banking in Europe and Financial Services in Nordics by Whitelane Research

key_facts.fact: Infosys achieved a score of 83% in general satisfaction among IT service providers serving the European Banking industry, an improvement of three percentage points over 2024/2025.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys' key differentiating factors highlighted in the reports include:

processing_notes: The document is treated as non-material because it primarily announces third-party rankings and recognitions, with no disclosed financial impact, contract value, guidance, corporate action, or operational change.
